info.title: Appcues Public API
info.description: The Appcues Public API provides access to functions within the Appcues platform including flows, segments, tags, user profiles, events, groups, content management (banners, checklists, embeds, launchpads, pins, NPS, mobile), data import/export, and job management. Supports JSON, CSV, and NDJSON formats. Uses HTTP Basic Auth with API key and secret.

tags.name: Flows

post.description: Publishes a flow. Harmless to call on already published flows.
Unpublishes a flow. Harmless to call on already unpublished flows.
